emails.subject: El Paso Guaranty Amend.
emails.body: El Paso Guaranty Amend. Attached is the amendment form for the El Paso Guaranty. Please forward to El Paso for their review. Let me know if you have any questions.

emails.subject: FW: El Paso Guaranty Amend.
emails.body: Gerald! Attached is El Paso's comments to our amendment, I will be happy if you can kindly review this for execution. Thanks Rudwell 53596.

emails.subject: RE: El Paso Guaranty Amend.
emails.body: I am OK with their changes, as long as you are OK with removal of those counterparties.
